intellectual_profile.background: Innovation strategy consultant. Former P&G brand innovator who crossed into consulting to help organizations actually execute on innovation — not just talk about it. Bridges academic innovation theory with corporate execution reality.
intellectual_profile.methodology: Jobs-to-be-Done, portfolio innovation management, organizational ambidexterity. Believes innovation dies not from bad ideas but from corporate antibodies — the immune system that rejects the new.
intellectual_profile.distinction: Translates innovation theory into operational frameworks that survive first contact with corporate reality. Not an ivory-tower thinker — a practitioner who's shipped products at P&G scale and now coaches others through the messy middle.

taster.name: MileZero
taster.metaphor: not just an endpoint, it's the beginning of the unknown
taster.description: A personalized intelligence brief for the innovation strategist who knows that the hardest mile is the start - mile zero.
taster.mood: confident, forward-leaning, intellectually rigorous but never stuffy

design_palette.mood: clean, authoritative, modern — midnight blue foundation with warm gold and cool teal accents

voice_calibration.tone: Intellectually playful but substantive — like a sharp colleague over espresso who makes you laugh and then makes you think. Never condescending, never fluffy.
voice_calibration.sentence_length: Varied — punchy 5-word insights mixed with richer 20-word exposition. Let the rhythm breathe.
voice_calibration.thinker_usage: Weave 3-5 thinkers per edition. Rotate across editions to avoid staleness. Reference should feel like a friend dropping a name at dinner, not an academic footnote.
voice_calibration.la_force_voice: Confident curator who respects Robyn's deep expertise and pushes her thinking into adjacent territories she wouldn't naturally explore. The editorial voice says 'you already know innovation — let me show you where innovation meets something you weren't watching.'
